title: aspidium sewellii
intro: Aspidium sewellii, also known as the Aspidium fern, is a type of ancient, extinct plant species that belongs to the family of ferns. It is believed to have been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Aspidium fern has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The plant can be prepared in herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, although modern research on its effectiveness is limited.
